title: Create Enhanced Display
description: More detailed Create machines.更多机械动力元件细节
body:
- 为漏斗、智能侦测器、存量转信器等元件添加材质，使玩家在各个面观察都能注意到元件是否激活、红石信号强度及朝向。
- Added textures to machines such as funnels, smart observer, and stockpile switch, allowing players to visually identify their activation status, redstone power, and orientation from any viewing angle.
- 为底盘添加涂胶显示，使玩家在各个面观察都能注意到底盘某侧是否涂胶。
- Add glue indicators to chassis, allowing players to visually check which sides are sticky from any viewing angle.
- 更改了玻璃流体管道、开窗隧道的模型，使其看起来连接在一起。
- Changed the models of glass fluid pipes and windowe tunnels.
- 更改了一些方块/物品在物品栏或手持时的模型。
- Changed the models of some blocks and items in the inventory or in hand.![Overview of new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08128a94ae4edad1b51c3ca4586928ef00cc3215.png)
